data.name: Rustomjee BigQuery Sales- 1 - To incentivise Repeat customer

nodes.name: Adding 6000 Incentive for the payment within 5 days

parameters.sqlQuery:
SELECT *
FROM powerbi-implementation.dataWarehouse_prod.sales_lead_app 
WHERE Customer_No__c = '476035' AND LeadSource = "Loyalty"

nodes.name: Query to fetch details of Source - Loyalty

parameters.sqlQuery:
SELECT *
FROM `powerbi-implementation.dataWarehouse_prod.sales_sv_oppr`
WHERE Customer_No__c = '476035' AND LeadSource = 'Loyalty'
AND StageName IN ('Site Visit Done', 'Revisit Done')

nodes.name: Query to fetch details of Source - Loyalty and Site Visit Done or Revisit Done

parameters.sqlQuery:
SELECT *
FROM `powerbi-implementation.dataWarehouse_prod.sales_sv_oppr`
WHERE Customer_No__c = '476035' AND LeadSource = 'Loyalty'
AND StageName = 'Booking confirmed' AND Booking__c IS NOT NULL;

nodes.name: Query to fetch details of Source - Loyalty and Booking Done

parameters.query:
SELECT EXISTS (
  SELECT 1
  FROM wallet_transaction_logs
  WHERE customer_code = '{{$json.customer_code}}'
  AND remarks = '{{$json.remarks}}'
  AND status = 'SUCCESS'
);

/* SELECT status
FROM wallet_transaction_logs
WHERE customer_code = '{{$json.customer_code}}'
AND remarks = '{{$json.remarks}}'
AND status = 'SUCCESS'
LIMIT 1; */

INSERT INTO wallet_transaction_logs (
    customer_code,
    amount,
    remarks,
    reference_id,
    transaction_note,
    status,
    status_code,
    message,
    request_payload,
    response_payload,
    execution_id,
    created_at
)
VALUES (
    {{$json.customer_code}},
    {{$json.amount || 0}},
    '{{($json.remarks || "").replace(/'/g, "''")}}',
    {{$json.reference_id ? `'${$json.reference_id}'` : 'NULL'}},
    '{{($json.transaction_note || "").replace(/'/g, "''")}}',
    '{{($json.status || "").replace(/'/g, "''")}}',
    {{$json.status_code || 500}},
    '{{($json.message || "").replace(/'/g, "''")}}',
    '{{JSON.stringify($json.request_payload || {}).replace(/'/g, "''")}}'::jsonb,
    '{{JSON.stringify($json.response_payload || {}).replace(/'/g, "''")}}'::jsonb,
    {{$json.execution_id ? `'${$json.execution_id}'` : 'NULL'}},
    NOW()
);
